# Copilot Instructions for Interactive Portfolio

This workspace contains an interactive animated portfolio website.

## Project Overview

- **Type**: React + Vite + Tailwind CSS Portfolio
- **Purpose**: Showcase engineering student profile with experience, projects, research papers
- **Features**: Smooth animations, responsive design, modern UI

## Key Technologies

- React 18 with TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS for styling
- Framer Motion for animations
- Vite for fast development
- Lucide React for icons

## Main Components

- [src/components/Navbar.tsx](src/components/Navbar.tsx) - Navigation with mobile menu
- [src/components/Hero.tsx](src/components/Hero.tsx) - Hero section with CTA
- [src/components/About.tsx](src/components/About.tsx) - About section
- [src/components/Experience.tsx](src/components/Experience.tsx) - Work experience
- [src/components/Projects.tsx](src/components/Projects.tsx) - Featured projects
- [src/components/Research.tsx](src/components/Research.tsx) - Research papers
- [src/components/Contact.tsx](src/components/Contact.tsx) - Contact form

## Quick Start

1. Install dependencies: `npm install`
2. Start dev server: `npm run dev`
3. Build: `npm run build`

## Customization Areas

- Update personal information in components
- Add your actual projects, experience, and research
- Modify colors in tailwind.config.js
- Update social links and contact info
- Add your actual email for contact form
